title: Donut Mods
description: A modpack aiming to provide great gameplay for the DonutSMP.
body:
## **About**
Donut Mods is a passion project that helps you play DonutSMP with better performance, combat, gameplay, and overall server experience!







## Out of beta! 
I will begin rapid firing new versions and improve the user experience!


<details>
<summary>A special Thanks</summary>
Over the course of 2 years, many people have improved their experience using my modpack. Shout out to you guys! I will improve the experience for us all!



</details>
